full_text:
Xiang Chan [Xiang Bo] 項纏[項伯]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Chan [Xiang Bo] (項纏[項伯]). Chu state. Uncle of Xiang Yu. Defended Liu Bang from Xiang Zhuang. Xiang Chan [Xiang Bo] was affiliated with Chu. Xiang Chan [Xiang Bo] lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
